title: Ancient Forgemastery
description: Adds a set of upgradable artifacts, each offering useful and fun features!
body:
![Ancient Forgemastery logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a7ee6c1cd1a4a3c3152620092c6983793d8f355.png)

**Ancient Forgemastery** introduces a unique set of powerful, upgradable artifacts that offer players new tools and mechanics to expand their gameplay. These gilded items provide practical abilities and functionality, while a rewarding upgrade system supports strategic growth of your favorite artifacts!
![New Item Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd2f02b688b078e1afefa6c7370228370b37e4dc.png)

## ⚜️ **GILDED ARTIFACTS**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### **COLLECTION MEDALLION**

![collector medallion item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4e113789fafc4155d4f74ca682ad05a1f171265.png)

   **✛**  Allows the holder to store experience.

   **✛**  When in Off Hand, stores twice the amount of XP orbs collected.

   
### **WARPING LANTERN**

![warping lantern item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/368bf4bbaeb034e8e29b737fb3dcef005ad48d4f.png)

   **✛**  Grants the holder the ability to teleport and switch places with another entity.

   **✛**  When placed, can be used as a teleportation anchor.


### **ELIXIR OF VITALITY**

![elixir of vitality item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cc3afaaa0180659ab02dcb95a7b5055ce8b2870.png)

   **✛**  Permanently increases maximum health when consumed.

   **✛**  Revives your lost companions when used on an Ember Blossom.


### **HOWLING HELMET**

![howling helmet item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9032de825e48da8ea069789d40d1c1d5fb273492.png)

   **✛**  Upon lethal hit, grants the wearer a brief survival window to reposition, escape, or survive death.
   
   **✛**  Makes skeletons fear the wearer.


### **RAVAGING CLAWS**

![ravaging claws item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3d9e6ad396aa3386afd8c7428c15e71bc9f901d.png)

   **✛**  The lower their health, the more damage the holder deals while ability is active.


### **SHIELD OF VINDICATION**

![shield of vindication item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/777a379b90b1f6edc306bd0824e995103f458956.png)

   **✛**  Reflects attacks when shield is charged.

   **✛**  When in Main Hand, shield is always charged but only at half the power, and durability wears out twice as fast.


### **ECHOING WARD**

![echoing ward item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7810d53fe1db7eef10f860ce5a6c632a567fa868.png)

   **✛**  Summons warden-like souls that protect the wearer.

   **✛**  When used on a companion, they are granted permanent guarding.
   

### **IRONBOUND GAUNTLET**

![ironbound gauntlet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/019e535364bf5af1a72e56a44d9bc72a24700c7e.png)

   **✛**  Accumulates charges by striking a target or block.

   **✛**  On target-charge use, launches the target in the direction the holder is facing.
   
   **✛**  On block-charge use, propels the holder in the opposite direction.


### **ENCHANTING TOME**

![enchanting tome item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5db2e0cb271e644df6255cbd47182c37d8ee867.png)

   **✛**  Allows the holder to further manipulate enchantments by transfering, duplicating, and amplifying enchantments past their vanilla limits.

</details>

## ⚜️ **DROPS/LOOT**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![drops/loot 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd6812f245180c09cf3d30519b8f99ebd1ff8365.png)
![drops/loot 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39cf9e29b5c0f03d633c47173c1a932cbcc5be7e.png)

### **REMNANT ARTIFACT**

   **✛**  Found in **blackstone temples**, ruined portals, buried treasures, and through archaeology in the overworld, as well as in bastion remnants in the nether.

### **RAVAGER HORN**

   **✛**  Dropped by **Ravager**.

### **WOLF FUR**

   **✛**  Dropped by **Wolf** while drying itself.

### **SOULSTONE**

   **✛**  Dropped by **Allay**.

### **PRIMORDIAL SOULSTONE**

   **✛**  Dropped by **Warden**.    
   
### **IRON ROOTS**

   **✛**  Dropped by **Iron Golem**.   

</details>

## ⚜️ **MORE FEATURES!**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


![forging altar block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41653054a9a834ccd81fe7f154837d96ebcd38f8.png)

### **FORGING ALTAR**

   **✛**  Used to upgrade **gilded artifacts**.
   
   **✛**  Connects to vertically adjacent Forging Altars.

![blackstone temple structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56ab1345eb2e1c4d2fc89db283e30561c13f5eec.png)

### **BLACKSTONE TEMPLE**

   **✛**  Found in the **Plains** biome.

</details>

This mod will keep on being updated as there are plans to introduce new items and features, so you are more than welcome to leave your own suggestions or ideas, as well as report any issues in our [Discord server!](https://discord.gg/yf9kddksdT)

**You may feature Ancient Forgemastery in your modpack!**
